productDisplayName: Nike Men Downshifter Black Sports Shoes
description: Enjoy your runs in style with the nike Downshifter 4 MSL running shoe. Lightweight and stylish, this pair is worth the add in your wardrobe as it also doubles up as a perfect lifestyle footwear when teamed with jeans and t-shirts.UpperSynthetic leather upper with mesh strips on the back foot for breathability and structural comfortMeshed and padded tongue with a lace-up system for snug Fit and comfortCushioned sockliner for in-step comfortSynthetic overlays with swooshes on the sides for enhanced shoe structureMidsolePhylon midsole for lightweight responsive cushioning and shock absorptionEncapsulated Air-Sole unit for enhanced cushioningExternal heel counter to lock the foot in placeOutsoleBRS 1000 rubber outsole for durabilityRubber shank for absolute midfoot support and torsional rigidity through midstanceForefoot flex grooves for smooth transitionHeel scoop for cushioned comfort and impact protectionMulti-directional and multi-depth rectangular and triangle lugs in the forefoot and heel for better gripShoe careDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlightRemove dust and dirt with dry clean cloth
